meaning: n.鼓,鼓声,鼓形圆桶,[解]鼓膜,鼓室vi.击鼓,作鼓声vt.打鼓奏
examples: When you beat the drum, you feel good.
As he sang he kept time on a small drum.
The drum is one of the oldest musical instruments.
We're stuck with these drum machines that are kind of more from the '80s.
They sang as they dug, their tuneless songs keeping time to the beat of a cooking pot drum.
